title: Urbanites Flock to Atlantic Canada as Pandemic Blunts Cities’ Appeal
content: As housing prices soar in big cities, the country’s eastern provinces are experiencing a surge in migration. Newcomers are being welcomed, but some locals are wary.
en_title: Urbanites Flock to Atlantic Canada as Pandemic Blunts Cities’ Appeal
en_content: As housing prices soar in big cities, the country’s eastern provinces are experiencing a surge in migration. Newcomers are being welcomed, but some locals are wary.

title: Migrants Say Belarusians Took Them to E.U. Border and Supplied Wire Cutters
content: Iraqi Kurds and other migrants said they were fleeing despair at home, but Belarus encouraged them, offering visas and helping them get to the border.

more_info.byline: By Jane Arraf and Elian Peltier
des_facet: Middle East and Africa Migrant Crisis

en_title: Migrants Say Belarusians Took Them to E.U. Border and Supplied Wire Cutters
en_content: Iraqi Kurds and other migrants said they were fleeing despair at home, but Belarus encouraged them, offering visas and helping them get to the border.

title: Dictator’s Son Says Daughter of Duterte Will Back Him in Philippine Election
content: Ferdinand Marcos Jr., who hopes to succeed Rodrigo Duterte as president, said Sara Duterte would effectively be his running mate.

more_info.byline: By Sui-Lee Wee and Jason Gutierrez
des_facet: Human Rights and Human Rights Violations

title: Deep Underground, a Chinese Miner Discovered Poetry in the Toil
content: Chen Nianxi has risen to fame as a “migrant worker poet,” adding the voice of China’s often-invisible laborers to the cultural conversation.
en_title: Deep Underground, a Chinese Miner Discovered Poetry in the Toil
en_content: Chen Nianxi has risen to fame as a “migrant worker poet,” adding the voice of China’s often-invisible laborers to the cultural conversation.

title: Migrant Crisis in Belarus Tests Putin’s Uneasy Alliance With Lukashenko
content: Last year Vladimir V. Putin helped save Aleksandr G. Lukashenko’s Belarusian regime. But Russia now has an ever-more-erratic ally and risks entanglement in a dangerous crisis.

des_facet: Middle East and Africa Migrant Crisis

title: In Border Crisis, Europe’s Unsavory Migration Deals Come Home
content: Europe has long paid other nations to keep refugees away from its borders. Now, Belarus wants something, too, and has brought migrants right to Europe’s door to get it.

en_title: In Border Crisis, Europe’s Unsavory Migration Deals Come Home
en_content: Europe has long paid other nations to keep refugees away from its borders. Now, Belarus wants something, too, and has brought migrants right to Europe’s door to get it.

title: Hong Kong Broadcaster’s Swift Turn From Maverick Voice to Official Mouthpiece
content: RTHK has often set the news agenda with its aggressive coverage of the city. But a Beijing clampdown has changed that, with pro-China coverage filling the void.
en_title: Hong Kong Broadcaster’s Swift Turn From Maverick Voice to Official Mouthpiece
en_content: RTHK has often set the news agenda with its aggressive coverage of the city. But a Beijing clampdown has changed that, with pro-China coverage filling the void.

title: Ethiopian Civil War Sparks Rancorous Debate Over Immigration to Israel
content: Thousands of relatives of the remnants of Ethiopian Jewry are waiting to be airlifted to Israel. For now, the Israeli government sees no urgency.
en_title: Ethiopian Civil War Sparks Rancorous Debate Over Immigration to Israel
en_content: Thousands of relatives of the remnants of Ethiopian Jewry are waiting to be airlifted to Israel. For now, the Israeli government sees no urgency.

title: In France, Kamala Harris Searches for Role on Global Stage
content: The vice president met with President Emmanuel Macron of France, skirting recent U.S.-French tensions, and immersed herself in issues like Libya and cybersecurity.

more_info.byline: By Katie Rogers and Zolan Kanno-Youngs

en_title: In France, Kamala Harris Searches for Role on Global Stage
en_content: The vice president met with President Emmanuel Macron of France, skirting recent U.S.-French tensions, and immersed herself in issues like Libya and cybersecurity.

title: Myanmar Court Sentences American Journalist to 11 Years
content: Danny Fenster was given the toughest possible sentence on three charges, in a signal that the country’s military rulers would not bow to international pressure.
en_title: Myanmar Court Sentences American Journalist to 11 Years
en_content: Danny Fenster was given the toughest possible sentence on three charges, in a signal that the country’s military rulers would not bow to international pressure.

title: For Some South Africans, de Klerk Missed Chances for True Reconciliation
content: The last white president of South Africa helped bring an end to the apartheid regime, but for many citizens, he never went far enough to disavow it. He left a video apologizing.

des_facet: War Crimes, Genocide and Crimes Against Humanity

en_content: The last white president of South Africa helped bring an end to the apartheid regime, but for many citizens, he never went far enough to disavow it. He left a video apologizing.

title: Julian Assange to Wed in Prison in Britain
content: The WikiLeaks founder, who is battling extradition to the United States on espionage charges, has been granted permission to marry Stella Moris in the London prison where he has been held since 2019.
en_title: Julian Assange to Wed in Prison in Britain
en_content: The WikiLeaks founder, who is battling extradition to the United States on espionage charges, has been granted permission to marry Stella Moris in the London prison where he has been held since 2019.

title: On Delhi’s Toxic River, Prayers to a Sun Struggling to Shine Through Smog
content: Every year, a four-day festival to the sun god Surya highlights the Indian city’s extreme air and water pollution, with a river so filled with foam it resembles a blizzard’s aftermath.

more_info.byline: By Mujib Mashal, Hari Kumar and Saumya Khandelwal

en_title: On Delhi’s Toxic River, Prayers to a Sun Struggling to Shine Through Smog
en_content: Every year, a four-day festival to the sun god Surya highlights the Indian city’s extreme air and water pollution, with a river so filled with foam it resembles a blizzard’s aftermath.

title: Germany’s Fourth Covid Wave: ‘A Pandemic of the Unvaccinated’
content: Germany once set an example for how to manage the coronavirus. Now, deep pockets of vaccine resistance are helping drive daily infections to new heights.
en_title: Germany’s Fourth Covid Wave: ‘A Pandemic of the Unvaccinated’

title: 2 Ivory Smugglers Captured in International Operation, U.S. Says
content: The men were captured by relying on DNA sampling from a previously seized ivory haul, which helped experts pinpoint the location of poached elephants.
